channel.title: Workflows on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Workflows on Arrans github.io

item.title: dagger/dagger
item.description: An open-source runtime for composable workflows. Great for AI agents and CI/CD.

item.title: continuedev/continue
item.description: ⏩ Ship faster with Continuous AI. Open-source CLI that can be used in TUI mode as a coding agent or Headless mode to run background agents

item.title: b4rtaz/svg-workflow-designer
item.description: Workflow designer written in TypeScript with no dependencies.
